Waiting for approval
What happens next? A Central Hub administrator will review your account, assign your sub-role(s) and subject specialty, and grant access. Once approved, you will be automatically redirected to the dashboard. This page checks for updates every 30 seconds.

Access Not Granted

Sorry, your request to access the Central Hub was not approved.

…
—
This hub is intended for Eduversal HQ staff. The Central Hub is the operations portal for Eduversal directors, subject specialists and coordinators. It contains network-wide administrative tooling, partner-school analytics, framework authoring and HQ-only management surfaces. If you believe you should have access, please contact the Eduversal team.
  • HQ tooling is restricted to Eduversal directors, coordinators and subject specialists
  • Cross-school analytics are visible to authorised HQ personnel only
  • Framework authoring + admin tooling is confidential to HQ
